case_title: LUIS SANCHEZ VS. HIEN NGOC PHAM

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT PHAM, HIEN NGOC AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA HIEN'S GENERAL CONSTRUCTION AND LANDSCAPING CO.
